requirements.name: NFPA 1001 Firefighter I & II Annual Training
requirements.description: Annual training requirement for firefighters certified to NFPA 1001 standard

requirements.name: NFPA 1021 Fire Officer Professional Development
requirements.description: Annual training requirement for fire officers

requirements.name: NFPA 1041 Fire Service Instructor Annual Training
NFPA 1403 Live Fire Training Compliance
requirements.description: Annual live fire training requirements and safety protocols

requirements.name: NFPA 1500 Occupational Safety Annual Training
requirements.description: Annual occupational health and safety training

requirements.name: NFPA 1072 Hazmat Responder Annual Refresher
requirements.description: Annual hazardous materials/WMD responder refresher for personnel certified to NFPA 1072 (Awareness, Operations, Technician, or Incident Commander levels).

requirements.name: NFPA 1006 Technical Rescuer Continuing Education
requirements.description: Annual continuing education to maintain technical rescue proficiency per NFPA 1006 (rope, confined space, vehicle, water, trench, or structural collapse rescue).

requirements.name: NFPA 1033 Fire Investigator Continuing Education
requirements.description: Annual continuing education across the required topic areas to maintain fire investigator competency per NFPA 1033.

requirements.name: NFPA 1031 Fire Inspector Continuing Education
requirements.description: Annual continuing education to maintain fire inspector and plan examiner competency per NFPA 1031.

requirements.name: NFPA 1035 Fire & Life Safety Educator / PIO Continuing Education
requirements.description: Annual continuing education for fire and life safety educators and public information officers certified to NFPA 1035.

requirements.name: NFPA 1051 Wildland Fire Fighter Annual Refresher
requirements.description: Annual wildland fire fighter refresher (e.g., RT-130) and fitness for personnel certified to NFPA 1051.

requirements.name: NFPA 1521 Fire Department Safety Officer Continuing Education
requirements.description: Annual continuing education for incident safety officers and health & safety officers per NFPA 1521.
